reviews.author: Ross Galleymore
reviews.text: Nice enough.... nothing wow but an easy and quick stop off. 5k vnd for entrance... As always some trash around... Adventurous route is almost impassable due to small landslide. Far too cold for a swim.

reviews.author: Han Nguyen
reviews.text: A local eco-tourism attraction renowned for its breathtaking waterfall. Can come for a soft hiking, swimming or a picnic. Visited few years ago, the management of the site wasn't very professional yet. There was a glamping area for staying overnight.

reviews.author: Queenie D.
reviews.text: Easy to go down to the waterfall. Besides sightseeing there is nothing else to do though. I don’t see anyone swimming, maybe because of the chill water. We were here in mid September, great weather.

reviews.author: Peter Johnston
reviews.text: It was closed today 15/1/2026 and the notice on the locked entrance gates said it has been closed since 21/11/2925. I asked around as to why and was told it was due to the heavy rains back in November and nobody knew when it will reopen

reviews.author: Ho Ngoc Tin
reviews.text: One of best place to see cherry blossom, with beautiful waterfall, the way to go down is okay, not too stiff or too far, only one thing is gabage from eating or drinking everywhere and nobody clean it.

reviews.author: Anastasia I
reviews.text: We were here in July. We arrived at lunchtime on a weekday expecting fewer people, but in fact there were so many, so many that there was a queue on the stairs down to the waterfall. On the downside: too many tourists, rubbish scattered all over the territory, paid passage. But the waterfall itself is beautiful. Time on the road and the road itself is not worth visiting this place.

reviews.author: Lam Giang Nguyen
reviews.text: It was not a huge science-seeing place, but the atmosphere was so fresh. You need to walk many steps if you choose the walking road, but you can ride the motorbike downward to the waterfall (you have to get through a hanging bridge - a little bit thrilling) It is a commercial and human-made spot, but anyway, the waterfall is natural and provides relaxing breaths

reviews.author: Nguyen Thanh Tam
reviews.text: One of the main destination in Mang Den, more for domestic tourists with several spot for check-in photos. Some nice parts with natural but will not worth for a day excursion

reviews.author: Bryan Kow (Anh Phong 峰哥)
reviews.text: I see at lot of people sharing nice waterfall here but when I visits here and I see this so different 😂😂 by the way nice experiences tho. Oh ya, you have to buy ticket for entry, it’s 20k vnd per pax.

reviews.author: Val N.
reviews.text: The place is beautiful, impressive waterwall and lots of flowers depending on the season you're going there. It has some Đà Lạt vibes. We sure had a nice walk and lunch at this place, the food is really good.

reviews.author: Devon Nguyen
reviews.text: Most beautiful and wild falls at Mang Den, friendly to visitors with rather safe stairs to go down to the ground of the falls. Just one coffee shop and small park next to the falls

reviews.author: Brian Hoang
reviews.text: Amazing waterfall, ticket cost 20k per person. They have food and drink service here. Even you want to stay overnight, they have Glamping area.

reviews.author: Nguyễn Thống Nhất
reviews.text: Pa Sỹ stream is amongst the most beautiful stream in Highland Vietnam. But the building and bridges are in low upkeep, beware of where you step

reviews.author: Roy Kok
reviews.text: This place is great for picnic and great waterfall scene, feeling great natural breeze. For those who planning for picnic you may consider here. However please be mindful that you have to carry lot of things up and down with stairs for a hundreds of steps, a bit tiring for those less of exercise (Note: But lot of oldies are climbing up & down as well)

reviews.author: Andrew Goodall
reviews.text: Awesome waterfall set in the beautiful forest and park. Natural paths are decorated with many flowers and status

reviews.author: Huong Giang Le Nguyen
reviews.text: Nice waterfall. Howervery the way down to waterfall doesnt make well, smoothly. There are many stip steps, so it is very tired.

reviews.author: Andrew Thurlow
reviews.text: The road is under construction and very tricky when raining but the waterfall and surroundings are very pretty. Love the motorbike parking bridge crossing

reviews.author: En Ka
reviews.text: Gate was wide open, no signs of being closed. When I reached the waterfall on the official track a very rude vietnamese man came up to me speaking vietnamese and making signs I need go to right away, no explanation why and rabbing my arm. 19.12. 2025

reviews.author: Bella Lay
reviews.text: BEAUTIFUL waterfall! We went twice it was so beautiful and refreshing to swim in, also would like to thank staff member Dat at the entrance for helping and directing us to someone who could fix our punctured tyre, we really appreciated it!

reviews.author: Chi Pham
reviews.text: Nice place to hang with your friends and bbq in the summer. Not so much in the winter. I came here in early December so what I enjoyed most was the Garden of Wooden Statues. Some of them have rotted due to the weather, but every statue is unique.

reviews.author: Hậu Lương
reviews.text: I am so excited about the entrance way. But I feel down when I see the waterfall, It's small and unnatural. No more people will be coming back:(

reviews.author: José Sánchez Barroso
reviews.text: Without any doubt, it's a wonderful waterfall park where enjoy for many hours & take a swimming time if the weather is hot. High recommended

reviews.author: Cassie R
reviews.text: We went here later in the day. It was a bit overcast and drizzly which meant that no-one else was there! We had the whole place to ourselves and it was spectacular. It was peaceful, green, luscious and had big butterflies everywhere, with birds singing. Such an amazing place. Be mindful of the drive in though, its slippery when wet and full of pot holes. It looks like they are resurfacing it at the moment so hopefully not long before the roads good to go.

reviews.author: Andres Perez
reviews.text: Nice green area with the waterfall and some kayaking activities with nature to walk around and enjoy

reviews.author: Chuong Nguyen-Nhu (Chris Chuong)
reviews.text: Beautiful waterfall surrounded by forest. Facilities and cleaning can be improved.

reviews.author: Brian Cotter
reviews.text: Nice little tourist area. Under developed, but that's ok! Good for a short visit.

reviews.author: cuong dang
reviews.text: - A beautiful waterfall should visit as you travel to Mang den.

reviews.author: Phúc Lộc
reviews.text: Recommend coming on a weekday, it’s very serene and not crowded at all.

reviews.author: T Huynh
reviews.text: It's a lovely waterfall. Nothing special but still nice to look at. It has stairs so it's easy to get to. However, there are a lot of trashes.

reviews.author: Ha Bui
reviews.text: Nice waterfall, it takes you few minutes from the gate to the fall. There's only waterfall and nothing more
